code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i <= n
    mut is_sep = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          is_sep = true
        else
          is_sep = false
        end
      when None
        is_sep = true
      end
    end
    if is_sep
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(__string_byte_at(s, i))}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn read_int_line() -> Int
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    match string.parse_int(string.trim(s))
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let nums = parse_ints(string.trim(line1))
  let target = read_int_line()
  match list.index_of(nums, target)
  when Some(i)
    println("index=#{i}")
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
end
